Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add RobotRachel branding: chart logos and left nav placement

This commit implements comprehensive RobotRachel branding across the application:

1. Chart Branding:
   - Created ChartContainer wrapper component that adds RobotRachel logo to all charts
   - Logo appears as subtle watermark (40% opacity) in bottom-right corner
   - Logo is captured in chart screenshots/downloads for reports
   - Updated all 7 analytics pages with 30+ charts to use ChartContainer
   - Replaced ResponsiveContainer with ChartContainer across:
     * Dashboard.tsx (2 charts)
     * BrandMentions.tsx (2 charts)
     * ShareOfVoice.tsx (4 charts)
     * SentimentAnalysis.tsx
     * PositioningAnalysis.tsx
     * DescriptorAnalysis.tsx
     * CompetitorThreats.tsx

2. Navigation Logo:
   - Moved RobotRachel logo from top nav to bottom of left sidebar
   - Logo links to http://www.robotrachel.com (opens in new tab)
   - Used white logo version for visibility on colored sidebar background
   - Implemented flexbox layout to pin logo to bottom
   - Added hover effect (opacity transition)

3. Assets:
   - Added robotrachel-logo.png (black version for charts)
   - Added robotrachel-white-logo.png (white version for sidebar)

Benefits:
- Consistent RobotRachel branding across all visualizations
- Single source of truth for chart logo styling
- Easy to customize logo appearance via props
- Future-proof for additional products (Heads, etc.)

EOF
